title: Button Lab
goal: Make buttons change text, count clicks, toggle a panel, and reset the page.

title: Counter Lab
goal: Build a counter with +1, -1, +5, reset, and a simple limit warning.

title: Input Greeting
goal: Read text from an input, validate it, and show a personalised greeting.

title: Colour Theme Picker
goal: Use a dropdown to change the look of the page.

title: Mini Calculator
goal: Build a calculator with add, subtract, multiply, and divide.

title: Quiz Engine
goal: Build a small quiz that moves through questions and tracks score.

title: Array List Render
goal: Render a list of products/cards from an array of objects.

title: Card Filter Search
goal: Filter cards as the user types into a search box.

title: Todo List Lite
goal: Add, complete, and delete tasks without local storage yet.

title: Todo Local Storage
goal: Upgrade the todo list so tasks survive page refresh.

title: Modal Tabs Accordion
goal: Build three common UI patterns: modal, tabs, and accordion.

title: Form Validation
goal: Validate a contact form before allowing a fake submit.

title: Text To Speech
goal: Convert typed text into speech, with voice, pitch, and rate controls.

title: Fetch JSON Users
goal: Fetch sample user data and render it as cards.

title: Weather App Shell
goal: Build the shell for a weather app and learn where the API code belongs.

title: Tic Tac Toe
goal: Build browser tic-tac-toe with a 3x3 board and win checking.

title: Soundboard Vanilla
goal: Build a simple soundboard using plain JavaScript before touching p5.js.

title: Mini Dashboard Capstone
goal: Build a small personal study dashboard with tasks, notes, and progress cards.
